title: CMS Healthcare Data Lookup
description: Look up Medicare fee schedules, denial codes, and NPI providers.

lookupType.title: Lookup Type
lookupType.description: What type of healthcare data to look up

cptCodes.title: CPT Code(s)
cptCodes.description: One or more CPT codes comma separated. Example: 99213

state.title: State
state.description: Two-letter US state code. Example: CA, TX, NY

year.title: Fee Schedule Year
year.description: Which CMS fee schedule year to use for reimbursement rates

codes.title: Denial Code(s)
codes.description: CARC or RARC denial codes comma separated. Example: 97, 96

codeType.title: Denial Code Type
codeType.description: CARC is Claim Adjustment Reason Code, RARC is Remittance Advice Remark Code

npiNumber.title: NPI Number
npiNumber.description: 10-digit National Provider Identifier number for direct lookup

providerName.title: Provider Name
providerName.description: Provider first and last name or organization name to search

specialty.title: Specialty
specialty.description: Provider specialty to filter results. Example: Internal Medicine
